User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user in the EduSmart Cloud application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user entity.

password.description: The user's password. Note: In a real-world application, passwords should be securely hashed and salted.

role.description: The user's role (e.g., Admin, Teacher, Student).

classId.description: Reference to Class. (Relationship: Class 1:N User).  The ID of the class the user belongs to, if applicable.

Class.title: Class
Class.description: Represents a class in the EduSmart Cloud application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the class entity.

teacherIds.description: List of IDs of teachers who manage this class.

Assignment.title: Assignment
Assignment.description: Represents an assignment in the EduSmart Cloud application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the assignment entity.

teacherId.description: Reference to User (Teacher). (Relationship: User 1:N Assignment). The ID of the teacher who created the assignment.

classIds.description: References to Class. (Relationship: Class N:N Assignment). The IDs of the classes the assignment is assigned to.

dueDate.description: The due date of the assignment.

Submission.title: Submission
Submission.description: Represents a student's submission for an assignment.

id.description: Unique identifier for the submission entity.

assignmentId.description: Reference to Assignment. (Relationship: Assignment 1:N Submission). The ID of the assignment the submission is for.

studentId.description: Reference to User (Student). (Relationship: User 1:N Submission). The ID of the student who submitted the assignment.

submissionDate.description: The date and time the submission was submitted.

grade.description: The grade received for the submission.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

definition.description: Stores class data. Supporting multiple teachers per class via teacherIds array.

params.name: classId
params.description: The unique identifier for the class.

params.name: assignmentId
params.description: The unique identifier for the assignment.

params.name: submissionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the submission.
